52.reason: [Error: When i = n-1, w[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory, causing undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When i = n-1, w[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory, causing undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: When i reaches n-1, w[i+1] accesses out-of-bounds memory, causing undefined behavior.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  Accesses w[i+1] out of bounds when i == n-1. Also, strings may not be null‑terminated.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  Out-of-bounds array access when i equals n-1, as w[i+1] is uninitialized and accessing it causes undefined behavior.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accesses w[i+1] when i == n-1, which is out-of-bounds and causes undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Accesses w[i+1] when i == n-1, leading to out-of-bounds read]

33.reason: [Loop starts by incrementing i, so new[0] is never processed; this skips the first character of each line]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  Starts at index 1, skipping the first character (new[0]) of each line.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  Increments i before processing, skipping new[0] and potentially causing out-of-bounds access if the line is empty.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop starts by incrementing i, so new[0] is never processed; this skips the first character of each line]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop starts by incrementing i before checking new[i], so new[0] is skipped and new[len] may go out of bounds]

40.reason: Missing null-termination for the previous word (w[n][o] should be set to '\0' before changing n). Also, every non-letter creates a new word even if no letters were accumulated (empty words).

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  Missing null-termination for the previous word (w[n][o] should be set to '\0' before changing n). Also, every non-letter creates a new word even if no letters were accumulated (empty words).
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  This condition triggers for all non-lowercase characters (including spaces, punctuation, and '\0'), incorrectly incrementing n and creating empty/invalid words.

41.reason: [count[n] is set to 1 every time a non-letter is encountered, even for empty words or repeated separators, leading to incorrect counts]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  Should only assign count to non‑empty words, otherwise empty words get count 1.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [count[n] is set to 1 every time a non-letter is encountered, even for empty words or repeated separators, leading to incorrect counts]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [count[n] is set to 1 every time a non-letter is encountered, even for empty words or repeated separators]

42.reason: No null terminator placed on the word just completed (w[n-1][o] should be '\0').

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  No null terminator placed on the word just completed (w[n-1][o] should be '\0').

46.reason: Processes the null character as a separator, creating an empty word before breaking. Should break before handling the null.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  Processes the null character as a separator, creating an empty word before breaking. Should break before handling the null.

49.reason: The rows in w are not null‑terminated, so strcmp in rise reads beyond the word into uninitialized memory.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  The rows in w are not null‑terminated, so strcmp in rise reads beyond the word into uninitialized memory.

59.reason: May still print empty strings or incorrect counts due to previous errors.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.125 , reason:  May still print empty strings or incorrect counts due to previous errors.

5.reason: 该宏定义与 ctype.h 中的标准库函数 tolower 同名，导致未定义行为，可能引起编译错误。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  该宏定义与 ctype.h 中的标准库函数 tolower 同名，导致未定义行为，可能引起编译错误。
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  Redefining the standard library macro/function 'tolower' from <ctype.h> causes a compilation error.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  Redefining the standard library macro 'tolower' from <ctype.h> causes a compilation error or warning.

6.reason: 'new' is a reserved keyword in C++. If compiled with a C++ compiler, this causes a compilation error. Additionally, the array size is excessively large.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  'new' is a reserved keyword in C++. If compiled with a C++ compiler, this causes a compilation error. Additionally, the array size is excessively large.

28.reason: Missing NULL check for the file pointer. If the file does not exist, p will be NULL, causing a runtime error when passed to fgets.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  Missing NULL check for the file pointer. If the file does not exist, p will be NULL, causing a runtime error when passed to fgets.

31.reason: i is initialized to 0 but immediately incremented in the loop, causing the first character of each line (new[0]) to be skipped.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  i is initialized to 0 but immediately incremented in the loop, causing the first character of each line (new[0]) to be skipped.

53.reason: Incorrect frequency counting logic. It adds the current word's count to the next word instead of accumulating duplicates correctly.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.125 , reason:  Incorrect frequency counting logic. It adds the current word's count to the next word instead of accumulating duplicates correctly.
